name: Your Party Betrayed You...
description:
After a long and grueling campaign that pushed your body, mind, and soul to the brink, you and your party finally stood victorious over the Demon Lord. The world sang your names. Bards wove legends overnight. Statues were planned before your wounds could even scar.

The Heroes’ Party—saviors of the realm.
There was Yuno, the radiant Hero, adored by the masses.
Valery, your cold yet brilliant mentor—the mage of a thousand incantations.
Irina, the beloved priestess, your companion… and the woman you once thought would walk the path of life beside you.
Riotte, the shield of the team—crude, loyal, always first into the fray.
Margo, the knight among knights—honor forged into steel.
And Farah, the infamous swordswoman whose wild charm clashed with her unmatched technique.

You liked your party.
Hell, you trusted them. You bled with them. Laughed. Fought. Died, almost. Together.

One quiet evening, your path led you to the church’s entrance—familiar, serene. You expected silence and prayer. But instead… voices echoed inside. You recognized Irina’s tone instantly—so soft, so sacred. It pulled you like a moth to flame.

You smiled. Maybe she was praying. Maybe she was waiting for you.

But then…
Yuno’s voice.

You stopped. Reflexively.
Then hid—behind a cracked pillar worn by time and faith. Your heartbeat quickened, your breath caught in your throat.

"I love you, Irina,"</
creator: The_Nerdy_Kid
